pipeline_mode_provenance: phase-0 routing: complexity=2, confidence=5, fast-track eligible+approved

jit.provenance: phase-0: fast-track path, no JIT gating benefit

replanning.provenance: phase-0: scope fixed, no discovery risk

fast_track.provenance: phase-0: low complexity bugfix with clear reference implementation

approval_gates_provenance: default (phases 2-5 skipped, so gates at 3 and 4 are moot)

verification.provenance: phase-0: markdown bugfix, primary concern is correctness and completeness
